- Opens a dropdown/menu/popover and queries for content (getByText, getByRole)
- Uses querySelector with OUIA selectors to interact with components
- Asserts on element roles, aria attributes, or data attributes that changed
If any test would break due to your changes, fix it. Common test fixes:
- Wrap assertions in waitFor() when content renders via portal
- Add popperProps={{ appendTo: 'inline' }} to component renders in tests
- Update getByRole/getByText queries to match new attribute values

Apply ALL of the following 8 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Lines: 255, 258, 271
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed]:
Property 'Button.variant' had its type changed (property): Return type of `variant` changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Button/Button.ButtonProps.d.ts
Before: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
After: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: link

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropTypeChange
Component: Button
Prop: variant
From: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
To: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

### Fix 2
Line: 280
Rule [family:Modal]:
## Modal Family Migration

Target structure (correct v6 composition):
```jsx
  <Modal appendTo={...} backdropClassName={...} disableFocusTrap={...} elementToFocus={...} id={...} isOpen={...} maxWidth={...} onClose={...}>
    <ModalBody role={...} />
    <ModalHeader description={...} descriptorId={...} help={...} labelId={...} title={...} titleIconVariant={...} titleScreenReaderText={...} />
    <ModalFooter />
  </Modal>
```

Props that stay on <Modal>: appendTo, backdropClassName, disableFocusTrap, elementToFocus, id, isOpen, maxWidth, onClose, onEscapePress, ouiaId, ouiaSafe, position, positionOffset, variant, width

Props that move to child components:
  description -> <ModalHeader />
  help -> <ModalHeader />
  title -> <ModalHeader />
  titleIconVariant -> <ModalHeader />

Removed props (move to child component as children or remove):
  actions -> map to appropriate child component (any)
  bodyAriaLabel -> ModalBody (as children, string)
  bodyAriaRole -> ModalBody (as children, string)
  footer -> ModalFooter (as children, ReactNode)
  hasNoBodyWrapper -> map to appropriate child component (boolean)
  header -> ModalHeader (as children, ReactNode)
  showClose -> map to appropriate child component (boolean)
  titleLabel -> map to appropriate child component (string)

Removed children (no longer valid JSX): ModalBoxCloseButton, ModalContent, ModalBox, ModalBoxBody, ModalBoxHeader, ModalBoxFooter

Add imports: ModalBody, ModalHeader, ModalFooter from '@patternfly/react-core'

Remove imports (if no longer used): ModalBoxCloseButton, ModalContent, ModalBox, ModalBoxBody, ModalBoxHeader, ModalBoxFooter

  Old import: @patternfly/react-core
  New import: @patternfly/react-core

New props on replacement:

Removed props (no replacement equivalent): actions, bodyAriaLabel, bodyAriaRole, description, footer, hasNoBodyWrapper, header, help, showClose, title, titleIconVariant, titleLabel

### Fix 3
Lines: 255, 258, 267
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: ./modal
  parentName: Modal

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

  256              {t('Reset')}

  258            <Button data-test="time-range-cancel" key="cancel" variant="link" onClick={() => onCancel()}>
  259              {t('Cancel')}

### Fix 4
Line: 10
Rule [sd-test-timepicker-transitive-behavioral-changes]:
TimePicker is affected by behavioral changes in rendered sub-components:
- TimePicker renders HelperTextItem which has a behavioral change: aria-hidden attribute removed from <span> in HelperTextItem
- TimePicker renders Popper which has a behavioral change: Default value for 'appendTo' prop on Popper changed from 'inline' to () => document.body

Tests for TimePicker may need updating. Fix options depend on the specific change:
- For portal changes: use waitFor(), popperProps=, or within(document.body)
- For role/DOM changes: update getByRole() queries to match new roles
- For attribute changes: update querySelector/getAttribute calls

Incident context:

  localName: TimePicker
  module: @patternfly/react-core

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/netobserv-web-console/source/web/src/components/modals/time-range-modal.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the source file and then the test file.
Now let me also check the local `./modal` import to understand its interface:

This is very important context. The `Modal` import on line 18 of the target file is from `./modal` — a **custom local modal wrapper**, NOT from `@patternfly/react-core`. This means Fix 2 (the Modal family migration) does NOT apply here since this isn't the PF Modal component.

Now let me reason through each fix:

**Fix 1** (Button variant type change): Lines 255, 258, 271 use `variant="link"` and `variant="primary"`. Both `"link"` and `"primary"` are still valid in the new type. The type just added `"stateful"`. **No change needed.**

**Fix 2** (Modal family migration): The `Modal` on line 247 is imported from `./modal` (line 18), which is a custom component wrapping `react-modal`, NOT `@patternfly/react-core` Modal. The `TextContent` children inside it are children of the custom modal, not of PF Modal. **No change needed** — this is a false positive.

**Fix 3** (Button icon children to prop): Looking at lines 255, 258, 267 — none of these Buttons contain icon elements. They contain text children (`{t('Reset')}`, `{t('Cancel')}`, `{t('Save')}`). **No change needed.**

**Fix 4** (TimePicker behavioral changes): This is informational — the TimePicker already has `menuAppendTo={() => document.body}` on lines 183 and 214. **No change needed** in the source file; will check tests.

**Fix 5** (Tooltip behavioral changes): Informational about Popper portal changes. **No change needed** in source; will check tests.

**Fix 6** (TextVariants removed → ContentVariants): `TextVariants` is used on lines 9, 159, 189, 281, 288. Must replace with `ContentVariants`. Import change needed.

**Fix 7** (Text → Content): `Text` component used on lines 7, 159, 189, 281, 288. Must replace with `Content`.

**Fix 8** (TextContent → Content): `TextContent` used on lines 8, 280, 284, 287, 294. Must replace with `Content`. Since `Text` is also being replaced with `Content` (Fix 7), the `<TextContent><Text ...>` pattern becomes `<Content><Content ...>` which is wrong. Looking at PF6 migration: `TextContent` was a wrapper, and `Text` had a `component` prop. In v6, `Content` replaces both — `<Content component={ContentVariants.p}>` is the correct pattern, and the outer `<TextContent>` wrapper is simply removed.

Let me apply fixes 6, 7, and 8 together:

- Remove `Text`, `TextContent`, `TextVariants` from imports
- Add `Content`, `ContentVariants` to imports  
- Replace `<TextContent><Text component={TextVariants.X}>...</Text></TextContent>` with `<Content component={ContentVariants.X}>...</Content>`
- In `getDateTimePickers`, `<Text component={TextVariants.h4}>` becomes `<Content component={ContentVariants.h4}>`

Now let me verify the test file. I already read it — let me analyze whether my changes would break any tests:

1. The tests use `document.querySelector('.pf-v6-c-button.pf-m-primary')` — this queries by PF CSS classes on Button. The Button component itself is unchanged, so this still works.
2. Tests use `document.querySelector('[data-test="..."]')` selectors — these are data attributes we didn't change, so they still work.
3. No tests query for `TextContent`, `Text`, or `Content` by role/text — the test assertions are about button clicks and date ranges.
4. The `Modal` is from `./modal` (custom), not PF, so no portal rendering changes affect tests.
5. `TimePicker` already has `menuAppendTo={() => document.body}` — no test changes needed.
6. `Tooltip` in this file doesn't appear to be tested in the test file.

The test file does not need any changes.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — Button variant type change (`variant="link"`, `variant="primary"`)
**No change needed.** The values `"link"` and `"primary"` remain valid in the new type union. The change only added `"stateful"` as a new option.

### Fix 2 — Modal family migration (wrap children in ModalBody)
**No change needed (false positive).** The `Modal` on line 247 is imported from `./modal` (line 18), which is a **custom local wrapper** around `react-modal`, NOT the `@patternfly/react-core` Modal. The conformance rule does not apply to this custom component.

### Fix 3 — Button icon children to prop
**No change needed (false positive).** None of the flagged Button instances contain icon elements as children. They contain only text children (`{t('Reset')}`, `{t('Cancel')}`, `{t('Save')}`).

### Fix 4 — TimePicker behavioral changes
**No change needed.** The `TimePicker` instances already have `menuAppendTo={() => document.body}` set. No test changes needed — tests don't interact with TimePicker dropdowns.

### Fix 5 — Tooltip behavioral changes
**No change needed.** The Tooltip in this file is not tested in the companion test file. No portal-related test queries to update.

### Fix 6 — `TextVariants` removed → `ContentVariants`
**Applied.** Replaced `TextVariants` with `ContentVariants` in the import statement and all 4 usage sites (lines 159, 189, 281, 288).

### Fix 7 — `Text` → `Content`
**Applied.** Replaced `Text` with `Content` in the import statement and all 4 JSX usage sites (lines 159, 189, 281, 288). Removed the now-unused `Text` import.

### Fix 8 — `TextContent` → `Content`
**Applied.** Since `Content` now serves the role of both `TextContent` (wrapper) and `Text` (with `component` prop), the `<TextContent><Text component={...}>...</Text></TextContent>` pattern was simplified to `<Content component={...}>...</Content>`. The outer `TextContent` wrappers were removed at all 4 sites (lines 280/284 and 287/294 in the modal body, lines 159 and 189 in `getDateTimePickers`). Removed the now-unused `TextContent` import.

### Fix 1 — Button variant type change (`variant="link"`, `variant="primary"`)
**No change needed.** The values `"link"` and `"primary"` remain valid in the new type union. The change only added `"stateful"` as a new option.

**No change needed (false positive).** The `Modal` on line 247 is imported from `./modal` (line 18), which is a **custom local wrapper** around `react-modal`, NOT the `@patternfly/react-core` Modal. The conformance rule does not apply to this custom component.

### Fix 3 — Button icon children to prop
**No change needed (false positive).** None of the flagged Button instances contain icon elements as children. They contain only text children (`{t('Reset')}`, `{t('Cancel')}`, `{t('Save')}`).

### Fix 4 — TimePicker behavioral changes
**No change needed.** The `TimePicker` instances already have `menuAppendTo={() => document.body}` set. No test changes needed — tests don't interact with TimePicker dropdowns.

### Fix 5 — Tooltip behavioral changes

### Fix 7 — `Text` → `Content`

### Fix 8 — `TextContent` → `Content`
